scrollOutput.title: Scroll Long Output
scrollOutput.description: Scroll output cells that exceed maximum height.

maxOutputHeight.title: Max Output Height
maxOutputHeight.description: Maximum height in pixels for output cells before scrolling.

wordWrap.title: Word Wrap
wordWrap.description: Wrap long lines in code cells.

clearOutputBeforeRun.title: Clear Output Before Run
clearOutputBeforeRun.description: Clear cell output before running the cell.

scrollmapEnabled.title: Show Scrollmap
scrollmapEnabled.description: Show markdown heading and selected cell markers on the notebook scrollbar when the scrollmap package is available.

scrollmapThreshold.title: Scrollmap Threshold
scrollmapThreshold.description: Hide notebook scrollmap markers if their count exceeds this value. Zero means no limit.

scrollmapDepth.title: Scrollmap Depth
scrollmapDepth.description: Maximum markdown heading depth to show in the notebook scrollmap. Zero means no limit.
